calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2023 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Sep-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Short Cause Trial Prove Up Hearing as to Defendant Xue Ping Li, an individual and as Trustee of the Xue Ping Li Living Trust Dated December 1, 2013.

Dept. 505; Judge: Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:41 p.m., pausing at 1:50 p. m., commencing at 1:51 p.m. and concluded at 1:56 p.m. (D505)

Warren Tse-Yan Woo, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Xin Zhao Ye and Plaintiff Lily Yep.
Plaintiff Xin Zhao Ye was present, placed under oath and testified.
Plaintiff Lily Yep was present, placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Xue Li Ping Li, an individual and as Trustee of the Xue Ping Li Living Trust Dated December 1, 2013, not appearing.
Witness for the Plaintiff, Linda Ye was placed under oath and testified.
Witness for the Plaintiff Yu Juan Yep was placed under oath.

Plaintiff Xin Zhao Ye and Plaintiff Lily Yep' complaint for Reformation of Deed, Recission of Deed, Accounting, Declaratory Relief and Quiet Title filed on May 23, 2022.
Proof of Personal service as to Defendant Xue Ping Li as an individual and as Trustee of the Xue Ping Li Living Trust Dated December 1, 2013, served on June 17, 2022.
Default entered as to Defendant Xue Ping Li as an individual and as Trustee of the Xue Ping Li Living Trust Dated December 1, 2013, on August 1, 2022.
Notice of Time and Place of trial filed July 7, 2023.
Dismissal as to Defendant Does 1 through 50 filed on July 7, 2023.

The Plaintiffs submit the following exhibit/s for the Court's review.

Exhibit 1: Conformed copies from the Court of Complaint and Summons.
Exhibit 2: Conformed copies from the Court of Request for entry of Default and Court judgment.
Exhibit 3: Conformed copies from the Court of Request of Dismissal of Doe Defendants.

Plaintiff Lily Yep was examined by the Court.
Plaintiff Xin Zhao Ye was examined by the Court.
The matter is submitted.
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Xin Zhao Ye and Plaintiff Lily Yep and against Defendant Xue Ping Li, an individual and as Trustee of the Xue Ping Li Living Trust Dated December 1, 2013, are as follows:

The Grant deed dated August 20, 2010 and recorded on August 27, 2010 as document number 2010-J032057-00 in the San Francisco Assessor-recorders Office is hereby REFORMED and shall be reformed as stated: " For valuable consideration, receipt of which is hereby acknowledged Xin Zhao Ye hereby grant (s) to his natural daughter, Lily Yu Hua Yep, a single woman, a Fifity Percent (that is, 50%) undivided tenancy in common interest.

Plaintiff Lily Yep is the sole owner of a Fifty Percent (that is, 50%) undivided tenancy in the common interest in the real property commonly known as 756-758 7th Avenue, San Francisco, County of San Francisco, State of California 94118 and more particularly described as:

Beginning at a point on the easterly line of 7th Avenue, distant thereon 210 feet northerly from the northerly line of Fulton street; running thence northerly along said line of 7th avenue 25 feet; thence at a right angle easterly 65 feet; thence a t a right angle southerly 25 feet; thence at a right angle westerly 65 feet to the point of beginning. Being a portion of Outside land Block No. 386. Assessor's Lot 20, Block 1649.

Costs: $755.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed this day.

Parties stipulate the return of exhibits.
